hero.title: Localize Your App, Instantly
hero.description: Upload your localization files, add context about your app, and get intelligent, tone-aware translations powered by LLMs.

upload.invalidFile: Please upload a valid JSON file

form.contextPlaceholder: e.g., This is a casual puzzle game for kids aged 6-10. Use friendly, playful language with emojis where appropriate.

results.title: Translation Result
results.note: Your translation is ready! Copy it or download as JSON. The file maintains the original structure with translated values.

status.awaitingHint: Fill in the form and click translate
status.uploadTitle: 📁 Upload a file to get started

contextAware.title: Context-Aware
contextAware.description: Provide context about your app to get tone-appropriate translations

free.title: Free To Use
free.description: No API keys, no payment required. Built on Cloudflare free tier.

fast.title: Fast & Reliable
fast.description: Powered by Llama 3 on Cloudflare edge network worldwide

footer.selfTranslated: 🌍 This website is available in multiple languages — translated using Transly itself.

recentFiles.title: Recent Files
recentFiles.historyOffMessage: History is off. New translations won't be saved.
recentFiles.empty: No recent files yet. Your translated files will appear here.

cookies.title: Before you continue
cookies.description: We use browser storage (localStorage) to remember your preferences and make the app more useful. No data leaves your device — we have no servers tracking you, no analytics, and no third-party cookies.

items.session: Basic app functionality and UI state

functional.title: Functional (opt-in)
functional.description: Enabled when you choose "Allow All", or individually when you use a feature.

items.apiKey: Your API key (stored only in your browser)

cookies.noTracking: No analytics. No ads. No third-party tracking. Ever.

featureConsent.recentFiles: Recent files will be stored in your browser. You can clear this anytime in settings.
featureConsent.apiKey: Your API key will be saved in your browser. It is never sent anywhere except the provider you configure.
featureConsent.language: Your language preference will be remembered for your next visit.

byoak.modelHint: Enter your API key above to load available models
byoak.contextHigherWarning: Changing this may cause failures with some models —
byoak.contextLowerWarning: If you pick a lower context window, the translation may take longer and less accurate
byoak.rememberKeyNote: Stored in localStorage — used only to call the translation provider
byoak.jsonNotSupported: This model may not support JSON output — translation may fail
